title: gaura neomexicana subsp. coloradensis
intro: Gaura neomexicana subsp. coloradensis, also known as the Colorado beebladder or beeblossom, is a plant species belonging to the evening primrose family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Gaura neomexicana subsp. coloradensis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
